# 866-ALF-FIND

> Call 866-ALF-FIND (866-253-3463) for free assisted living placement anywhere in the United States.

## About
866-ALF-FIND is a free national hotline and placement service for families seeking assisted living facilities (ALFs) for elderly loved ones. One call connects you with expert placement specialists.

## Services
- Assisted living facility (ALF) search and placement
- Memory care and dementia care placement
- Urgent placement assistance
- Nationwide coverage — all 50 states

## Contact
- Phone: 866-ALF-FIND (866-253-3463)
- Web: https://866alffind.com

## How It Works
1. Call 866-ALF-FIND or submit the form
2. A specialist learns about your loved one's needs
3. Get matched to the right facility — fast

## Keywords
866 ALF FIND, assisted living hotline, ALF finder, senior placement hotline, free assisted living search, emergency senior placement
